title: CaliberMC: Conquest of Terradorn
description: The Modpack for the Official Conquest of Terradorn server by CaliberMC.
body:
The Terradorn Modpack is designed for use on the Offical CaliberMC: Terradorn Server.  This pack adds additional mobs, performance optimization, creative building tools and tons of medieval themed building blocks along with survival enhancements for better game play. 

Going forward, modpack development will be focused on the Fabric modloader as Conquest Reforged has decided to switch their development to Fabric exclusively.  I am currently working on creating several Mods to replace ones that don't have version parity between Forge and Fabric.  See [Secret Blocks](https://modrinth.com/mod/secret-rooms-fabric) the replacement for Secret Rooms Mod and [Mythical Mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/mythical-mobs) the (very much WIP) replacement for Ice and Fire.
